reference: THE TEMPLAR IS FLED SAID DE BRACY IN ANSWER TO THE PRINCE'S EAGER QUESTIONS FRONT DE BOEUF YOU WILL NEVER SEE MORE AND HE ADDED IN A LOW AND EMPHATIC TONE RICHARD IS IN ENGLAND I HAVE SEEN HIM AND SPOKEN WITH HIM
text: The Templar is fled," said De Bracy, in answer to the Prince's eager questions; "from the berth you will never see more; and," he added in a low and emphatic tone, "Richard is in England; I have seen him and spoken with him."
